profile.name: Muhammad Saad
profile.location: Darra Adam Khel, Akhorwal, FR Kohat, FATA, Pakistan
profile.university: Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute of Engineering Sciences and Technology (GIKI)
profile.bio: A passionate Computer Engineering student specializing in Hardware Architecture, IoT, and Embedded Systems. Leveraging advanced agentic workflows and 'vibe coding' methodologies, I collaborate with AI agents to architect and deploy high-performance full-stack applications with exceptional speed. I thrive at the intersection of physical hardware, low-level FPGA design, and next-generation AI-collaborative software engineering.

projects.title: IoT-Based Health Monitoring System
projects.description: A comprehensive health monitoring solution using ESP32 microcontroller that tracks vital signs in real-time and transmits data to a cloud dashboard for remote patient monitoring.

projects.title: Digital Door Lock System
projects.description: A secure digital door lock system featuring keypad input, RFID authentication, and remote access capabilities with real-time notifications.

projects.title: ECG Monitoring System
projects.description: A medical-grade ECG monitoring system with signal processing algorithms for heart rate detection, arrhythmia analysis, and data visualization.

projects.title: RISC-V 5-Stage Pipeline Processor
projects.description: A custom RISC-V processor implementation featuring a 5-stage pipeline architecture with custom MAC (Multiply-Accumulate) operation support, designed in Verilog.

projects.title: Facial Attendance Management System
projects.description: An automated attendance system using computer vision and facial recognition with FastAPI backend for efficient classroom management.

projects.title: DAK Welfare Organization App
projects.description: A full-stack React application for managing welfare organization activities, donations tracking, and beneficiary management.

projects.title: Akhorwal Coal Company Database System
projects.description: A robust database management system for coal mining operations featuring inventory tracking, sales management, and comprehensive reporting.

projects.title: Pharmacy Management System
projects.description: A complete pharmacy management solution with inventory control, prescription tracking, billing system, and expiry date alerts.

education.institution: Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute of Engineering Sciences and Technology

experience.description: Actively seeking internships and research positions in embedded systems, FPGA design, and IoT development.
